posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
General questions 2 lines_black colored2160×2160 240 KB

Here’s what our monday experts recommend

If you want real value from AI, it’s not about using everything.
It’s about using the right things that save you time.

Explore what monday AI can do:

  • AI Blocks: Ready-made, customizable actions that automate tasks like summarizing, categorizing, or extracting info, right from your board

  • monday sidekick: Built-in AI assistant that understands you, your role, and your goals.
    It helps you plan, execute, brainstorm ideas, write content, and analyze data anywhere in your workspace.

  • monday magic: Turn a simple prompt into a complete workspace- including boards, dashboards, views, and docs. Plus, every solution comes with a built-in onboarding video to guide your team and get everyone aligned fast!

  • monday vibe: build secure, enterprise-grade apps in minutes, connected to your data and built right into your workspace.

Spot your team’s time-wasters.
What’s taking too much time? writing summaries, organizing info, or following up on updates? Look for those repetitive tasks that slow you down.

Enhance, don’t reinvent.
Use AI to simplify what already works.
Start small, track the impact, and expand what works.

Have a question about using monday.com more effectively?
Drop it in the comments. Your question might be featured in our next post!
